event.message: New instance of BPEL process "1.0" initiated (# "SendWOTChanges").

event.label: writeOpaque

event.label: InvokePutProjects

event.label: InvokePutVideosPACP

event.label: InvokePutVideosPACP
event.message: Faulted while invoking operation "putVideosPACP" on provider "SewerAIVideos".
event.details: f1191361-68e9-7a44-8495-4e6cccf28977 6dbc8178-ec38-6641-b865-eb834ecc17c3 CP MH248962 MH250786 7789 CB C 450 667.72199999999998 3.565 667.48800000000006 3.55 7616 89 AVE Edmonton IDYLWYLDE 71.980000000000004 1952 279762.1 Testing 28.2 - Missgin WO # from fixing Jenkins 10.1A 0OK200{"results":[{"sid":"e77be41d-f651-4f87-98af-b50d408b620a","header":{"City":"Edmonton","Shape":"C","Height":450,"Street":" 7616 89 AVE","Project":"Testing 28.2 - Missgin WO # from fixing Jenkins","Material":"CP","Pipe_Use":"CB","PO_Number":"10.1A","WorkOrder":"279762.1","IsImperial":false,"Upstream_MH":"MH248962","Total_Length":71.98,"Up_Elevation":"667.722","Custom_Fields":{"Custom_Field_One":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Six":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Ten":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Two":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Five":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Four":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Nine":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Eight":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Seven":{"Label":"","Description":""},"Custom_Field_Three":{"Label":"","Description":""}},"Downstream_MH":"MH250786","Drainage_Area":"IDYLWYLDE","Down_Elevation":"667.488","Year_Constructed":1952,"Up_Grade_to_Invert":3.56,"Down_Grade_to_Invert":3.55,"Pipe_Segment_Reference":"7789"}}]} 0

event.label: SetFeedMessageFromPutVideosFault
event.details: <vFeedMessage><vFeedMessage xmlns:def="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xsi:type="def:string" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">PutVideos failed: http=; fault=Unhandled fault in PutVideos_AllTypes</vFeedMessage></vFeedMessage>

event.label: InvokeUpdateCRInspectStatus
event.message: Started invocation of operation "update" on partner "UpdateCRInspectStatus".
